summary: Completed testing for Shop page deep dive - iteration 230. All backend APIs working correctly with services_master collection. Desktop and mobile views fully responsive. Products (638) and Services (50 displayed, 706 total) tabs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Service-box API correctly uses services_master collection for CRUD
✅ Stats API returns 2542 total services with 706 shop services
✅ ShopPage.jsx has proper Products/Services tab toggle (data-testid attributes present)
✅ Mobile responsive design with 2-column grid, compact cards, smaller text
✅ Desktop view shows full grid with hover effects and sidebar filters
✅ Pillar filter pills visible in both views (10 pillars)
✅ Service cards display name, price, pillar badge, bookable status correctly
Note: Frontend limits services to 50 for performance (line 346 in ShopPage.jsx) - intentional design choice

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both desktop and mobile views working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page verified: Products tab (638), Services tab (50 displayed out of 706). Backend service-box API uses services_master collection. Desktop 1920px shows sidebar filters and hover effects. Mobile 375px shows 2-column grid, compact cards with Add buttons, mobile filter drawer. All data-testid attributes working for tab-products, tab-services, shop-search, pillar-pill-*, service-card-*.

frontend_desktop_1920px.categories: All Products, Celebrations(191), Accessories & Toys(108), Treats(100), Pupcakes & Dognuts(39)

frontend_mobile_375px.filter_drawer: ✅ Best Sellers, New Arrivals, Pawmeter Rated, On Sale, Grain Free, Organic, Subscribe & Save
frontend_mobile_375px.add_button: ✅ Compact teal Add button on cards
